text:
The rise of artificial intelligence brings many benefits, but it also raises serious ethical questions. One major issue is bias. AI systems often learn from data that contains human prejudices, leading to unfair decisions in hiring or lending. To ensure fairness, developers must carefully examine their data and models.

Privacy is another concern. AI can collect and analyse huge amounts of personal information, so we need strong rules to protect it. Transparency also matters—users should know how and why an AI makes a decision. Ultimately, responsible AI development means involving diverse teams, testing thoroughly, and putting human well-being first. When we tackle these ethical challenges, we build technology that truly serves everyone fairly and safely.
